text: The world is shifting beyond ownership.
People today no longer want to own everything they experience, only to access it exactly
when and where they need it.
And for the first time, AI gives us the power to truly understand people, to anticipate
needs before they're even spoken.
At Tulu, we've built the world's most powerful product access and usage platform, powered
by two engines.
The Tulu units, micro-retail touchpoints that bring products on demand right where people
live.
And the Tulu brain, our AI engine that learns from real usage behaviors, personalizes every
experience and builds lasting habits.
Today, more than a quarter of a million people in over 60 cities around the world have access
to Tulu right in their building.
And every 10 seconds, someone, somewhere, is using a product or a platform.
By now, Tulu is way more than just an amenity.
It's becoming a necessity, a new way of urban living.
We're really proud that the world's leading owners and operators are choosing to bring
the Tulu experience of own less, live more to their residents, making it a core part
of the lifestyle that they offer.
We're excited to announce a new funding round, bringing total investment in Tulu to more
than $40 million.
This new capital will help us scale Tulu to millions of people worldwide, while deepening
our consumer understanding.
A new consumption economy is happening.
Tulu is the main driver.
Join us for the ride and let's shape together a more sustainable and responsible way of
living.
Did you tell that guy to come?
